title: Winchester Plastic Garden Ebony Trough 60cm Suitable For External Use Recycled Material Home Windows Greenhouses Patios Balconies Ideal Present
features: This traditional bell trough is suitable for both indoor and outdoor use for all kinds of plants and shrubs.
Featuring a unique self watering design at the base of the pot. Simply drill out the drainage holes from the base and the pot will create a self watering reservoir at approx 1.5cm deep.
description: Winchester Bell Trough Plastic plant pot. Black Colour. Overall length 60.5cm including rim approx. Height 15.5cm approx. Width 20cm Internal lenght 57.5cm approx. Internal height 15cm approx. Internal Width 16.5cm approx This traditional bell trough is suitable for both indoor and outdoor use for all kinds of plants and shrubs. Featuring a unique self watering design at the base of the pot. Simply drill out the drainage holes from the base and the pot will create a self watering reservoir at approx 1.5cm deep.
